text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Walking past the dorm, I happen to catch sight of
Taiki Shuttle cleaning listlessly.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Finally done with the entrance. By now, I bet everybody's already...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: The whole dorm's playin' board games today...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: But I'm on cleaning duty 'cause I broke curfew... Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps due to the shock of the whole ordeal,
Taiki Shuttle remains down in the dumps for some
time.
